Happy Anniversary / 🌹

For You,
my love.

I didn’t want to just tell you how I feel… I wanted to create something you can come back to.
Not just today, but anytime you need it.

scroll
❤️ Why I love you

There are a thousand reasons I keep choosing you, but here are just a few:

🌸
  1. The way you laugh at completely stupid things — and make me laugh just by laughing.
  2. You earned an opportunity to Europe by being genuinely that brilliant. I watched you work for it, and I've never been prouder of anyone in my life.
  3. You're emotionally honest in a world that rewards pretending. I see how rare that is.
  4. The way you make ordinary moments feel significant just by being in them with me.
  5. You challenge me. Not to be more, but to be more myself.
  6. Even from a distance, you have never once made me feel alone.
  7. I believe in you completely. When given a chance, you don’t just make the best of it—you turn challenges into something extraordinary. Even if life gives you lemons, you somehow make more than lemonade—you make magic
"You are the kind of person that makes the world feel larger and warmer at the same time."
💌 Letters for you

Open when…

🌸

Tap a letter. Read it when you need it most.

Missing someone this much means you love them that much. Let yourself feel it — don't push it down. Then text me, because I probably miss you too and I'm pretending I'm fine.

The distance is real. But so is this. So is us.
You don't have to be okay right now. You've been carrying a lot — your work, your future, the distance, all of it at once.

Rest isn't giving up. It's how you keep going. Drink some water, close your laptop, and come back tomorrow. I'll still be here.
I know what I see. I see someone who earned an opportunity to the best school in Europe by actually being that good — not lucky, not by accident.

Doubt is just fear wearing a suit. It doesn't know you the way I do. You're more capable than you let yourself believe, and I will keep believing it for you until you believe it yourself.
You’re honestly one of my favorite people.Even on random days, you make life feel lighter.

Think of our funniest moment and rate it 1–10. Then tell me why it’s a 10.. 😊
New places are supposed to feel strange at first. That's not a sign you made the wrong choice — it's a sign you're doing something brave.

You are going to Europe because you worked hard enough to belong there. The unfamiliarity fades. The growth doesn't. And every time zone that separates us still finds us on the same call.
I love you in the quiet, unremarkable moments just as much as the big ones.

I love you when we say nothing. When we're both just existing on a call. When you forget to text me back and I know it's because you fell asleep trying or working late.

I am in love with the whole, real, complicated version of you Khaleel — not just the highlight reel.

🏗️ Our love story

What we're building

🌸

I don't think of us as a love story. I think of us as a project — something we're both actively choosing to build, together, day after day.

We're not just growing as people separately. We're learning how to grow side by side without losing ourselves. That's harder, and it means more.

I want a life with depth. With someone who challenges me, who I can be honest with, who I'm genuinely proud of.

"That's you Khaleel. That's what we're building — and I wouldn't choose anyone else to build it with."
different locations, same direction

This next chapter

🌸

Right now we're both in China, just in different places. And soon you'll be in Europe — an opportunity you worked for, a step you earned.

I'm proud of you. Genuinely, not just because I'm supposed to say it. You're doing something brave and I want to be the person cheering the loudest.

The distance does scare me, but we've already proven we can hold this. Different time zones, different skies — but the same conversation, the same direction, the same us.

This chapter is just a longer paragraph. The story isn't changing.

💬 Talk to me

I'm listening

🌸

Hey. I've been waiting for you to open this. 🌹
🌹

I choose you on the easy days
and on the hard ones.

And I'd choose you again.
Every single time.

— With all of me, always Tifa ✦
